content.speakerText: Here’s your rental agreement and the 24/7 roadside assistance number.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的租赁合同和24小时道路救援电话。

options.text: Thanks! Can I save this number in my phone?
I’ll return it tomorrow if I don’t need it.
Can you email me a copy instead?
I don’t need this—I have my own insurance.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了获取救援电话的积极态度，并表达了保存号码的意图，符合场景中'务必保存救援电话'的要求。干扰项中，第二个误以为合同可退回，第三个要求邮件替代，不符合现场即时确认的需求，第四个拒绝援助服务，违背安全原则。

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, just call this number—no need to come back to the counter.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果出问题，直接打这个电话，不用回柜台。

options.text: Can I get a refund if I don’t use it?
Do you have a mobile app for support?
I’ll call you if I’m lost.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对远程支援的接受和准备，符合'确认远程支援是否全国通用'的意图。干扰项中，第二个询问退款，与服务使用无关；第三个转向App，虽合理但非对话焦点；第四个说'call you'模糊不清，未使用指定号码。

content.speakerText: Before you leave, just double-check: do you have the emergency contact and your car’s location tracker enabled?
content.speakerTextCn: 在您离开前，请再次确认：您有紧急联系人信息和车辆定位功能已开启吗？

options.text: Yes, I’ve saved the number and turned on the tracker. Thanks for reminding me!
I’ll check when I get to my hotel.
I don’t think I need that—I’m a good driver.
Can you send me a text with the details?

content.explanation: 正确答案完整回应了双重确认要求，使用了场景关键词（emergency contact, tracker）并表达感谢。干扰项中，第二个推迟行动，违背'最后确认'的紧迫性；第三个轻视安全措施，不符合教学重点；第四个要求再次发送，未体现主动确认。

content.template: Thanks! Can I ___ this number in my phone?
content.hint: 用于保存联系方式的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：save a number（保存号码）

content.template: I’ll keep it ___—I won’t need to go back to the counter.
content.hint: 表示'随时可取用'的地道表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：keep it handy（随时带着）

content.template: Is this number valid ___ the country, or only in this city?
content.hint: 表示'全国范围内'的介词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 介词用法：across the country（全国范围内）

content.speakerText: Here’s your rental agreement and the 24/7 roadside assistance number.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的租赁合同和24小时道路救援电话。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I’ll save it right away.
Great, thanks! Can I take a photo of it too?
Appreciate it—I’ll make sure this is saved in my contacts and set as a speed dial.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示会保存号码
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'save', 'number', 'roadside assistance' 等关键词

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, just call this number—no need to come back to the counter.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果出问题，直接打这个电话，不用回柜台。
expectedAnswers: Perfect! I’ll keep it in my wallet just in case.
Thanks! What if I’m abroad? Is it still free to call?
Got it—so I can call anytime, even at 3 a.m.?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认远程支援的可用性
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'call', 'anytime', 'abroad' 等表达
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的口语语气（如 'just in case', 'even at 3 a.m.'）
关键词覆盖：是否提及 'call', 'number', 'no need to return' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: One last thing—please confirm you have the emergency contact saved and your car’s GPS tracker turned on.
content.speakerTextCn: 最后一件事——请确认您已保存紧急联系人并开启了车辆GPS定位功能。
expectedAnswers: Yes, I’ve saved the number and turned on the tracker. I feel much safer now.
I just did—I double-checked both. Thanks for reminding me!
I’ve got it covered: the emergency contact is in my phone, and the GPS is active. Appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认两项安全措施已完成
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'saved', 'turned on', 'GPS tracker' 等术语
表达自然度：是否自然流畅，有适当的情感表达（如 'feel safer', 'appreciate'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'emergency contact', 'GPS tracker', 'confirmed' 等关键短语
